---
title: "AFP General Overview"
author: Greg Brooks
date: 04/26/2026
draft: true
categories:
    - Industry Commentary
    - Paid Resources
    - Conference Recap
execute: 
  enabled: true
  error: true
---



Conference recap from the 2026 AFP blah blah blah you get it.

# Overview
First time at AFP - some sensible and useful breakout rooms, some not so much. This post is about the sensible ones. 

## Keynote address
Just kidding, I skipped the keynote. Keynotes are pointless - the vestigial organ of professional conferences. Spare me.
